item.title: (Btw it can also be true they are both victim and oppressor - vets are mistreated in the society, they also uphold a system that...
item.description:
(Btw it can also be true they are both victim and oppressor - vets are mistreated in the society, they also uphold a system that systemically mistreats others, the liberation of both , though of unequal immediacy, is necessary) The best propagandist for soemthing is the person who benefits from that thing. Thats why by FAR the best way for Israel to support the IDF is to insert soldiers into social life. Why in the world can we not recognize that’s what America does as well?



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: What an odd guy- not to mention this is disrespectful to Muslim, that is entirely his goal
item.description:
What an odd guy- not to mention this is disrespectful to Muslim, that is entirely his goal. But he managed to fit Zionism, Immigration, fascist policy and proLGBT stuff in one video. If it weren’t nonsense I’d be included to give him props

item.title: Of COURSE they see their ally’s in the peopel that want to promote expansion and maintenance of the western empire - and when th...
item.description:
Of COURSE they see their ally’s in the peopel that want to promote expansion and maintenance of the western empire - and when they speak to liberals they speak a totally different tune.
